name: varro
description: OpenCode with real project context, agent control, and sessions that stay with your code.

scripts.build: npm run build:extension && npm run build:webview
scripts.dev: npx concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names ext,web,preview "npm run watch:extension" "npm run watch:webview" "npm run preview:webview"
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.extension.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.webview.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.e2e.json
scripts.package: npm run build && npx vsce package --no-dependencies
scripts.vscode:install: rm -f varro-*.vsix && npm run package && NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 code --install-extension varro-*.vsix

varro.server.command.description: Optional path to the OpenCode CLI executable Varro uses for server startup and other CLI-backed actions

varro.server.autoUpdate.description: Automatically install OpenCode CLI updates only through Varro's tested compatibility ceiling. Newer untested releases are shown as an upgrade prompt instead

varro.chat.expandThinkingByDefault.description: Expand thinking blocks by default in the chat view.

varro.chat.showStickyUserPrompt.description: Show the sticky user prompt preview while scrolling long assistant responses.

varro.chat.desktopSessionPaneSide.markdownDescription: Choose which side shows the sessions pane on large screens in the Varro chat view.

varro.chat.defaultPermissionMode.markdownDescription: Permission mode selected when no project or global Varro permission-mode selection has been saved. `default` asks before state-changing actions, `auto` judges eligible requests automatically, and `full` grants unrestricted access.

varro.chat.autoRenameUntitledSessions.markdownDescription: Let Varro generate a fallback title when OpenCode leaves a session untitled. Disable this to rely only on OpenCode's native session naming.

varro.chat.autoCompact.description: Enable automatic OpenCode session compaction when context is full. Project opencode.json overrides this setting.

varro.chat.autoCompactionReservedTokens.description: Reserved token headroom before automatic OpenCode compaction triggers. Lower values compact later. Set to null to use OpenCode defaults. Project opencode.json overrides this setting.

varro.context.autoAttachFile.description: Automatically include the active file in live editor context

varro.context.autoAttachSelection.description: Automatically include the current selection in live editor context

varro.providerLimits.disabled.markdownDescription: Disable provider-limit polling and hide provider-limit UI.

varro.providerLimits.thresholdPercent.markdownDescription: Show provider-limit UI only when at least one provider-limit window has this remaining percent less than or equal to the threshold.

varro.debug.simulateMissingCli.deprecationMessage: Debug only setting. Not intended for regular use.
varro.debug.simulateMissingCli.description: Debug only: make Varro behave as if the OpenCode CLI is not installed

varro.debug.simulateNoProviders.deprecationMessage: Debug only setting. Not intended for regular use.
varro.debug.simulateNoProviders.description: Debug only: make Varro behave as if no providers are configured

varro.server.autoStart.deprecationMessage: Debug only setting. Not intended for regular use.
varro.server.autoStart.description: Automatically start the OpenCode server when Varro first needs it

varro.providerLimits.enabledAdapters.deprecationMessage: Debug only setting. Not intended for regular use.
varro.providerLimits.enabledAdapters.markdownDescription: Allowlist of provider-limit adapters Varro may poll. Supported IDs: `anthropic` (Anthropic), `github-copilot` (GitHub Copilot), `openrouter` (OpenRouter), `zai` (Z.ai), `minimax` (MiniMax), `openai` (OpenAI), `gemini` (Gemini/Google), `antigravity` (Antigravity). Defaults to `anthropic`, `github-copilot`, `openrouter`, `zai`, `minimax`, and `openai`.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Varro starts a local OpenCode process and grants it access to the workspace.
